info.title: 1. Agreement to Terms
paragraph: These Terms constitute a legally binding agreement between you and Big Chief Entertainment, LLC governing use of the Platform.
By using the Platform, you agree to these Terms. If you do not agree, discontinue use immediately.

info.title: 2. Platform Services
paragraph: The Platform provides content hosting, advertising services, and monetization tools.
We may modify or discontinue services at any time without liability.

info.title: 3. Accounts
paragraph: You are responsible for your account and all activity under it.
We may suspend or terminate accounts at our discretion.

info.title: 4. Intellectual Property
paragraph: All Platform content is owned by the Company or its licensors and protected by law.
Unauthorized use is strictly prohibited.

info.title: 5. User Content License
paragraph: You grant the Company a perpetual, worldwide, royalty-free license to use and monetize your content.
You confirm you have rights to all content submitted.

info.title: 6. Advertising System
paragraph: We operate CPM and CPC advertising models.
Metrics such as impressions and clicks are estimates and not guarantees.
We reserve full control over ad delivery and placement.

info.title: 7. Payments & Stripe Processing
paragraph: All payments are processed via third-party providers including Stripe.
You agree to Stripe’s terms and applicable financial laws.
We are not liable for payment processor errors, delays, or disputes.

info.title: 8. Creator Earnings, Holds, and Reserves
paragraph: Earnings are subject to verification and fraud detection.
We may apply payout holds, rolling reserves, or delays for risk management.
Payments are issued monthly and may take up to ten (10) business days.
Minimum payout thresholds apply and may change at any time.
We reserve the right to reverse or claw back payments tied to invalid activity.

info.title: 9. Tax Compliance
paragraph: Creators must provide required tax documentation, including W-9 forms for U.S. users, before receiving payouts.
We may issue 1099 forms where required by law.
You are solely responsible for reporting and paying all applicable taxes.

info.title: 10. Fraud & Invalid Activity
paragraph: We monitor for click fraud, bot traffic, artificial engagement, and manipulation.
Violations may result in account termination and forfeiture of earnings.
We have sole authority to determine fraudulent activity.

info.title: 11. Advertiser Payments & Refund Policy
paragraph: All advertising purchases are final unless otherwise agreed in writing.
Refunds are not guaranteed and are subject to investigation.
Chargebacks may result in account suspension and legal enforcement.

info.title: 12. Disclaimer of Warranties
paragraph: The Platform is provided “AS IS” without warranties of any kind.
We do not guarantee uptime, accuracy, or performance.

info.title: 13. Limitation of Liability
paragraph: We are not liable for indirect or consequential damages.
Total liability shall not exceed amounts paid within the last 30 days.

info.title: 14. Indemnification
paragraph: You agree to indemnify and hold harmless the Company from claims arising from your use of the Platform.

info.title: 15. Arbitration & Class Action Waiver
paragraph: PLEASE READ CAREFULLY. THIS SECTION AFFECTS YOUR RIGHTS.
All disputes shall be resolved by binding arbitration administered by the American Arbitration Association (AAA).
Arbitration will take place in North Carolina.
YOU WAIVE ALL RIGHTS TO CLASS ACTIONS AND JURY TRIALS.
Disputes must be brought individually.
You may opt out within 30 days by emailing support@bigchiefnewz.com.
We may seek court relief for intellectual property or security violations.

info.title: 1. Data Collection
paragraph: We collect personal, technical, and usage data.

info.title: 2. Use of Data
paragraph: Data is used for authentication, analytics, advertising, fraud prevention, and platform improvements.

info.title: 3. Sharing
paragraph: Data may be shared with Stripe, advertisers, and infrastructure providers.
We do not sell personal data.

info.title: 1. Compliance
paragraph: We comply with 17 U.S.C. § 512.
Valid takedowns will result in removal of content.

info.title: 2. Repeat Infringers
paragraph: Accounts of repeat violators will be terminated.

info.title: 1. Monetization
paragraph: Creators grant monetization rights to the Company.
Revenue is based on verified activity and platform rules.

info.title: 2. Payment Rules
paragraph: Payments require tax compliance and fraud checks.
We may hold, delay, or deny payouts.

info.title: 1. Models
paragraph: We operate CPM, CPC, and sponsored ad models.

info.title: 2. Fraud Detection
paragraph: We actively detect invalid traffic and suspicious behavior.
Violations result in penalties including loss of earnings.
